info.title: AutoDS API
info.description: Backend API for the AutoDS autonomous data science platform.

post.summary: Create account
post.description: Create a new user account and return an access token.

post.summary: Log in
post.description: Authenticate and return an access token.

get.description: Return the currently authenticated user's identity.
List all projects owned by the current user.

post.summary: Create Project
post.description: Create a new project (analysis session).

get.description: Return full state for a project.

delete.description: Permanently delete a project and all its state.

post.summary: Activate Project
post.description: Mark a project as the active session (sets workflow_status=active).

schema.title: Response Activate Project Projects  Project Id  Activate Post

post.summary: Upload File
post.description: Upload a file and load it into the session source cache.

parameters.name: project_id

schema.description: Project to attach this source to
schema.title: Project Id

parameters.description: Project to attach this source to

get.description: List all built-in sample datasets (no auth required).

schema.title: Response List Samples Upload Samples Get

post.summary: Load Sample
post.description: Load a built-in sample dataset into the session source cache.

parameters.name: project_id

schema.description: Project to attach this source to
schema.title: Project Id

parameters.description: Project to attach this source to

post.summary: Load Connector
post.description: Load data via a named connector (database, API, cloud, etc.).

parameters.name: project_id

schema.description: Project to attach this source to
schema.title: Project Id

parameters.description: Project to attach this source to

post.summary: Suggest Join
post.description: Suggest join keys for two cached sources.

post.summary: Apply Join
post.description: Execute a join between two cached sources and cache the result.

get.description: Return the first N rows of a cached source as JSON records.

schema.title: Response Preview Source Upload Preview  Source Id  Get

post.summary: Auto-detect domain from uploaded data
post.description: Run domain detection on the project's loaded data sources.

post.summary: Set target column, problem type, user mode, and goal
post.description: Apply domain, target, problem type, user mode, and goal to the project.

post.summary: Mark configuration complete and advance to first pipeline step
post.description: Advance the project to the EDA step and set workflow_status=active.

post.summary: Generate domain-aware EDA questions for the project
post.description: Return interactive EDA questions based on domain and data profile.

schema.title: Response Generate Questions Eda Generate Questions Post

post.summary: Submit answers to EDA questions
post.description: Store user answers to EDA questions in project state.

schema.title: Response Answer Questions Eda Answer Post

post.summary: Start EDA analysis in the background
post.description: Launch EDA execution as a background task and return the job_id.

schema.title: Response Run Eda Eda Run Post

get.description: Return EDA analysis results once the background job completes.

post.summary: Get per-column feature engineering suggestions
post.description: Return domain-aware FE suggestions for each column in the project.

post.summary: Apply feature engineering decisions in the background
post.description: Store FE decisions and launch feature engineering as a background job.

schema.title: Response Apply Decisions Fe Apply Post

get.description: Return FE results once the background job completes.

post.summary: Configure modeling: algorithms, metric, validation strategy
post.description: Merge user model configuration into project state and return an ETA estimate.

schema.title: Response Configure Modeling Modeling Configure Post

post.summary: Start model training in the background
post.description: Schedule model training as a background job and return the job_id.

schema.title: Response Train Models Modeling Train Post

get.summary: Retrieve model leaderboard for a project
get.description: Return all trained model results ranked by primary metric.

post.summary: Override best-model selection for a project
post.description: Persist a user-chosen model as the project best model.

schema.title: Response Select Best Modeling Select Best Post

post.summary: Compute SHAP values (sync ≤50 rows, async >50 rows)
post.description: Return SHAP values synchronously for small samples; launch background job for large ones.

post.summary: Run a what-if analysis by modifying feature values
post.description: Apply feature modifications to a base row and compare predictions.

post.summary: Run fairness audit on the best model
post.description: Compute disparate-impact and group-fairness metrics for protected attributes.

get.summary: Retrieve or generate model card for a project
get.description: Return the standardised model card (Google model card format) for the project.

post.summary: Predict a single row using the project's best model
post.description: Load best model and return prediction + optional SHAP values for one row.

post.summary: Start batch prediction in the background
post.description: Schedule batch inference as a background job; returns job_id and row count.

post.summary: Send a follow-up message in the project conversation
post.description: Dispatch message to the follow-up agent and return the assistant reply.

get.summary: Retrieve full chat history for a project
get.description: Return all chat messages exchanged in the project session.

delete.summary: Clear chat history for a project
delete.description: Wipe all chat messages from the project session.

schema.title: Response Clear History Chat History  Project Id  Delete

post.summary: Enqueue a report generation job
post.description: Schedule report generation as a background job and return the job_id.

get.description: Return the generated report file as a binary download.
Return current status and progress for a background job.

delete.description: Request cancellation of a pending or running job.

schema.title: Response Cancel Job Jobs  Job Id  Delete

get.description: Return the result payload for a completed job.
Open a Server-Sent Events stream that emits JobProgressEvent updates until the job reaches a terminal state.
Return all registered tools with optional category/domain filter.

get.summary: Get a single tool entry by registry key
get.description: Return full metadata for a tool by its registry key.

get.summary: Get paginated pipeline log for a project
get.description: Return paginated pipeline log entries for a project (newest first).

get.summary: Get API cost summary for a project
get.description: Return API call count, token count, and per-step cost breakdown.
Return all domain configurations from domain_configs.yaml.

Return all agent prompts from agent_prompts.yaml.

Admin-only in production. Currently accepts any authenticated user.
TODO: add role/email check once a roles system is in place.

AgentPromptsResponse.title: AgentPromptsResponse
AgentPromptsResponse.description: Contents of configs/agent_prompts.yaml keyed by agent name.

ProjectListItem.title: ProjectListItem
ProjectListItem.description: Lightweight summary for the sidebar / project-picker.
